mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM store_promotion_goods_celebrity WHERE prom_id = #{id} AND goods_id IN
#{item}
mapper.select: SELECT spg.id, ssp.prom_title, spg.goods_title, spg.goods_pic_url, scp.account, scp.platform_type, scp.avatar_url, spgc.create_time, spgc.prom_price, spgc.celebrity_price, scp.followers_num, scp.country_name FROM store_promotion_goods spg LEFT JOIN store_promotion_goods_celebrity spgc ON spg.id = spgc.goods_id LEFT JOIN store_celebrity_private scp ON spgc.celebrity_private_id = scp.id LEFT JOIN store_seller_promotion ssp ON ssp.id = spgc.prom_id WHERE spg.prom_id = #{promId}

SELECT IFNULL(sum(spgc.celebrity_price), 0) celebrity_price, IFNULL(sum(spgc.celebrity_paypal_fees), 0) celebrity_paypal_fees, IFNULL(sum(spgc.prom_price), 0) prom_price FROM store_promotion_goods_celebrity spgc LEFT JOIN store_promotion_goods spg ON spgc.goods_id = spg.id WHERE spgc.prom_id = #{promId} AND spgc.id != #{goodsCelebrityId} AND spgc.celebrity_status =1 AND spgc.is_del = 0

SELECT IFNULL(sum(spgc.celebrity_price), 0) celebrity_price, IFNULL(sum(spgc.tax_amount), 0) taxAmount, IFNULL(sum(spgc.celebrity_paypal_fees), 0) celebrityPaypalFees, IFNULL(sum(spgc.prom_price), 0) prom_price FROM store_promotion_goods_celebrity spgc LEFT JOIN store_promotion_goods spg ON spgc.goods_id = spg.id WHERE spgc.prom_id = #{promId} AND spgc.id != #{goodsCelebrityId} AND spgc.celebrity_status =1 AND spgc.celebrity_prom_status !=- 1 AND spgc.is_del = 0

select * from (SELECT spgc.extension_code, spgc.seller_name, spgc.celebrity_counselor_id, spgc.celebrity_counselor_name, spgc.prom_price, spgc.celebrity_price, spgc.celebrity_pay_amount, spgc.online_time, scp.account AS celebrity_account, sep.create_time AS create_time, sep.prom_title AS promTitle, sep.total_amount AS totalAmount, sep.prom_status, spg.goods_title, spg.goods_pic_url, scp.platform_type, qn.nickname, qn.counselor_user_name, qn.counselor_user_id, qn.sid FROM store_promotion_goods_celebrity spgc LEFT JOIN store_celebrity_private scp ON spgc.celebrity_private_id = scp.id LEFT JOIN store_seller_promotion sep ON sep.id = spgc.prom_id LEFT JOIN store_promotion_goods spg ON spg.id = spgc.goods_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ssu.id, su.id sid, su.qr_code, su.nickname, su.counselor_user_id, su.counselor_user_name FROM sys_user AS su LEFT JOIN sys_user AS ssu ON su.id = ssu.seller_counselor_id WHERE su.user_type = 3 AND su.nickname != '' AND ssu.username != '' ) qn ON sep.seller_id = qn.id) goods WHERE online_time IS NOT NULL
and extension_code like CONCAT('%', #{storePromotionGoodsCelebrityModel.extensionCode}, '%')
and prom_status = #{storePromotionGoodsCelebrityModel.promStatus}
and celebrity_account like '%${storePromotionGoodsCelebrityModel.celebrityAccount}%'
and celebrity_counselor_id like '%${storePromotionGoodsCelebrityModel.celebrityCounselorId}%'
and seller_name like '%${storePromotionGoodsCelebrityModel.sellerName}%'
AND sid = #{storePromotionGoodsCelebrityModel.sid}
AND counselor_user_id = #{storePromotionGoodsCelebrityModel.counselorUserId}
and DATE_FORMAT(online_time, '%Y-%m-%d') >= DATE_FORMAT(#{storePromotionGoodsCelebrityModel.startOnlineTime},'%Y-%m-%d')
and DATE_FORMAT(online_time, '%Y-%m-%d') <= DATE_FORMAT(#{storePromotionGoodsCelebrityModel.endOnlineTime},'%Y-%m-%d')
ORDER BY online_time DESC

select * from (SELECT spgc.extension_code, spgc.seller_name, spgc.celebrity_counselor_id, spgc.celebrity_counselor_name, spgc.prom_price, spgc.celebrity_price, spgc.celebrity_pay_amount, DATE_FORMAT( spgc.online_time, '%Y-%m-%d' ) AS online_time, scp.account AS celebrity_account, DATE_FORMAT( sep.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d' ) AS promTime, sep.prom_title AS promTitle, sep.total_amount AS totalAmount, sep.prom_status as prom_status, spg.goods_title, scp.platform_type AS platform_type, qn.sid, qn.nickname, qn.counselor_user_name, qn.counselor_user_id FROM store_promotion_goods_celebrity spgc LEFT JOIN store_celebrity_private scp ON spgc.celebrity_private_id = scp.id LEFT JOIN store_seller_promotion sep ON sep.id = spgc.prom_id LEFT JOIN store_promotion_goods spg ON spg.id = spgc.goods_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ssu.id, su.id sid, su.qr_code, su.nickname, su.counselor_user_id, su.counselor_user_name FROM sys_user AS su LEFT JOIN sys_user AS ssu ON su.id = ssu.seller_counselor_id WHERE su.user_type = 3 AND su.nickname != '' AND ssu.username != '' ) qn ON sep.seller_id = qn.id) goods WHERE online_time IS NOT NULL
and extension_code like '%${goodsCelebrityModel.extensionCode}%'
and prom_status = #{goodsCelebrityModel.promStatus}
and celebrity_account like '%${goodsCelebrityModel.celebrityAccount}%'
and celebrity_counselor_id like '%${goodsCelebrityModel.celebrityCounselorId}%'
and seller_name like '%${goodsCelebrityModel.sellerName}%'
AND sid = #{goodsCelebrityModel.sid}
AND counselor_user_id = #{goodsCelebrityModel.counselorUserId}
and DATE_FORMAT(online_time, '%Y-%m-%d') >= DATE_FORMAT(#{goodsCelebrityModel.startOnlineTime},'%Y-%m-%d')
and DATE_FORMAT(online_time, '%Y-%m-%d') <= DATE_FORMAT(#{goodsCelebrityModel.endOnlineTime},'%Y-%m-%d')
ORDER BY online_time DESC

select extension_code, seller_name, celebrity_counselor_id, celebrity_counselor_name, prom_price, celebrity_price, SUM( celebrity_pay_amount ) AS celebrity_pay_amount, online_time, celebrity_account, promStartTime, promEndTime, promTitle, totalAmount, prom_status, goods_title, platform_type, nickname, counselor_user_name, counselor_user_id, sid from (SELECT spgc.extension_code, spgc.seller_name, spgc.celebrity_counselor_id, spgc.celebrity_counselor_name, spgc.prom_price, spgc.celebrity_price, spgc.celebrity_pay_amount, spgc.online_time, scp.account AS celebrity_account, sep.prom_start_time AS promStartTime, sep.prom_end_time AS promEndTime, sep.prom_title AS promTitle, sep.total_amount AS totalAmount, sep.prom_status, spg.goods_title, scp.platform_type, qn.nickname, qn.counselor_user_name, qn.counselor_user_id, qn.sid FROM store_promotion_goods_celebrity spgc LEFT JOIN store_celebrity_private scp ON spgc.celebrity_private_id = scp.id LEFT JOIN store_seller_promotion sep ON sep.id = spgc.prom_id LEFT JOIN store_promotion_goods spg ON spg.id = spgc.goods_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ssu.id, su.id sid, su.qr_code, su.nickname, su.counselor_user_id, su.counselor_user_name FROM sys_user AS su LEFT JOIN sys_user AS ssu ON su.id = ssu.seller_counselor_id WHERE su.user_type = 3 AND su.nickname != '' AND ssu.username != '' ) qn ON sep.seller_id = qn.id) goods WHERE online_time IS NOT NULL
and extension_code like '%${storePromotionGoodsCelebrityModel.extensionCode}%'
and prom_status = #{storePromotionGoodsCelebrityModel.promStatus}
and celebrity_account like '%${storePromotionGoodsCelebrityModel.celebrityAccount}%'
and celebrity_counselor_id like '%${storePromotionGoodsCelebrityModel.celebrityCounselorId}%'
and seller_name like '%${storePromotionGoodsCelebrityModel.sellerName}%'
AND sid = #{storePromotionGoodsCelebrityModel.sid}
AND counselor_user_id = #{storePromotionGoodsCelebrityModel.counselorUserId}
and DATE_FORMAT(online_time, '%Y-%m-%d') >= DATE_FORMAT(#{storePromotionGoodsCelebrityModel.startOnlineTime},'%Y-%m-%d')
and DATE_FORMAT(online_time, '%Y-%m-%d') <= DATE_FORMAT(#{storePromotionGoodsCelebrityModel.endOnlineTime},'%Y-%m-%d')
ORDER BY online_time DESC
